basics.name: Andrés Ochoa
basics.label: Backend & Automation Engineer
basics.principal_summary: Systems Engineer with 3+ years of experience across backend development, process automation, and data analysis. I build reliable APIs and integrations using Python (FastAPI, Django, Flask), design scalable relational databases (SQL Server), and automate workflows with tools like Power Automate and n8n to reduce manual work and improve operational efficiency.
basics.summary: Data & RPA Developer | Python, FastAPI & Django Expert | APIs, Integrations & Automation | AI Implementation | N8N Specialist

work.name: Financiera Comultrasan
achievements: Automated business processes using Microsoft Power Platform (Power Automate) and Python for data processing, task automation, and REST API consumption.
Integrated internal systems and external platforms via APIs, optimizing workflows and reducing manual tasks across financial processes.
Designed and structured relational database schemas from scratch, ensuring scalability and data consistency.

work.name: Agencia de Aduanas ABC Repecev SAS (Nivel 1)
achievements: Designed and optimized relational databases in SQL Server, using stored procedures to improve performance and data management.
Developed and integrated REST APIs with Django, Flask, and FastAPI for secure and efficient data exchange.
Automated 7+ business processes using Python and AI integrations, reducing operational time and costs.
Managed projects and version control using Git/GitHub and Azure DevOps; collaborated on scalability and operational efficiency initiatives.

work.name: Somos.plus (EH2 Ingeniería)
achievements: Designed and developed complex workflows in n8n to automate repetitive operational tasks.
Integrated APIs, CRMs, and corporate forms using HTTP nodes, Webhooks, and custom logic.
Built data pipelines and synchronization processes to ensure data consistency; documented and optimized workflows for maintainability.

work.name: Net Applications SAS
achievements: Developed Python scripts for API consumption and internal data processing.
Automated inventory management and purchase order generation using Automation Anywhere and SQL.
Performed data analysis to optimize operational processes, reducing manual errors and increasing productivity.

work.name: WM Wireless & Mobile
achievements: Improved performance and maintainability of applications developed in .NET Core.
Managed SQL Server and MySQL databases for efficient data storage and retrieval.
Built core features using C#, JavaScript, Angular, and jQuery; contributed to backend architecture improvements.

volunteer.summary: Helped organize coding workshops and mentored new members.

projects.name: EziApply
projects.description: Platform that helps candidates tailor their resume to a specific job description, increasing relevance and improving the chances of getting a response. AI-powered resume optimization.
